question: What is our average order value?
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(sale_price) / COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped')
analyst_notes: AOV = revenue / distinct orders, on revenue-counting statuses only. Never AVG(sale_price) — that is average ITEM price, not order value; multi-item orders make the two diverge badly.
author: claude-draft
